scenarios.name: challenged_overturn
notes: challenge bond is recoverable when challenger wins
verifier stake slash is additional non-USDC punishment

scenarios.name: spam_challenge_cost_floor
notes: spurious challenges must tie up more capital than a single verifier fee
losing a dispute is more expensive than waiting through one objective-task verification cycle

scenarios.name: pilot_exposure_cap
notes: a second equal-sized task is blocked when maxOpenExposure is 160 USDC
bounded loss is enforced before a second task can be opened or accepted

scenarios.name: independent_confirmation_requirement
notes: primary verifier alone cannot settle a confirmed-policy task
settlement requires one additional eligible confirmer or a challenge-resolution path
